author: Nick Smith
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Academic year planner for teachers — timetable management, lesson tracking, and weekly planning.

manifest.author: Nick Smith
manifest.description: Academic year planner for teachers — timetable management, lesson tracking, and weekly planning.
manifest.name: Teacher Planner

name: Teacher Planner

releases.author: NSDerred
releases.description:
Settings — School Timetable
- Sort periods by start time on every render so the editor always
  displays them in chronological order, regardless of how they were
  entered or imported. Reordering persists on save.

Setup Wizard — School periods (Step 7)
- Add a block-type dropdown to each period row, populated from the
  block types defined earlier in the wizard. New periods default to
  the first defined block type instead of a hardcoded "lesson".

Setup Wizard — Clear all
- Add a confirm-guarded "Clear all" button to both the Holidays & INSET
  step (Step 4) and the School periods step (Step 7).

Setup Wizard — default holiday labels
- Rename default holidays: "Christmas" → "Winter Break",
  "Easter" → "Spring Break".

Settings — Edit active planner (new)
- Add an "Edit" button to the active planner card opening a new
  EditPlannerModal (src/modals/EditPlannerModal.ts) to change the
  planner name and academic-year start/end dates after creation.
- On save, timetable templates shift by the same day-delta as the
  start date so the timetable and A/B week rotation realign to the
  corrected range. Independent dated content (holidays, INSET, date
  events, slot exclusions, week notes, lesson-note files) is left
  untouched. Validates date format and ordering; active planner only.

Also repaired truncated tails in SettingsTab.ts and SetupWizardModal.ts
that were preventing the build.
releases.name: Editable planner dates, wizard improvements, timetable sort fix
